recommendations.title: Eraserhead
recommendations.overview: First-time father Henry Spencer tries to survive his industrial environment, his angry girlfriend, and the unbearable screams of his newly born mutant child.

recommendations.title: Black Friday
recommendations.overview: A group of toy store employees must protect each other from a horde of parasite infected shoppers.

recommendations.title: Them!
recommendations.overview: As a result of nuclear testing, gigantic, ferocious mutant ants appear in the American desert southwest, and a father-daughter team of entomologists join forces with the state police officer who first discovers their existence, an FBI agent and, even

recommendations.title: Ticks
recommendations.overview: Teens camping in a northern California retreat are terrorized by mutant insects created by evil, polluting pot farmers.

recommendations.title: Return of the Killer Tomatoes!
recommendations.overview: Crazy old Professor Gangreen has developed a way to make tomatoes look human for a second invasion.

recommendations.title: Jeruzalem
recommendations.overview: When a couple of American young adults fly to Israel to visit the city of Jerusalem, a biblical nightmare falls upon the city.

recommendations.title: Slither
recommendations.overview: A small town is taken over by an alien plague, turning residents into zombies and all forms of mutant monsters.

recommendations.title: Turtles Can Fly
recommendations.overview: Turtles Can Fly tells the story of a group of young children near the Turkey-Iraq border. They clean up mines and wait for the Saddam regime to fall.

recommendations.title: Squirm
recommendations.overview: A violent electrical storm topples power lines into the rain soaked earth that is home for an aggressive breed of worms. The high voltage causes the worms to mutate into larger, hostile hordes of man-eating worms that lie in wait for the residents of

recommendations.title: Cold Storage
recommendations.overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.
